unmet_need: Personalized, gradual, and interactive introduction to new music genres
example_quotes: too many add very boring, no mixes
E. Mon Daved. Spotify playlist 👍 I can hear the rumbling
trying to get into jazz but i keep bouncing off it. i need a guided on-ramp not a 5 hour playlist someone help
When Discover Weekly actually nails it, it's pure magic and honestly the reason I pay for premium.
My discover weekly is stale. Every week it's the same vibe and the same handful of artists. I'm bored of it.
The algorithm is an echo chamber. It reinforces what I already play instead of expanding my taste into new artists.

unmet_need: Control over discovery experience and transparency into recommendation logic
example_quotes: the recs never tell me WHY a song was picked. i don't trust a recommendation that comes with no reason
give me a dial for how adventurous my recs are. some days i want comfort, some days i want a real stretch
Recommendations never explain why a track was picked. I don't trust a suggestion that comes with no reason.

unmet_need: low-effort, personalized music recommendations that expand their existing tastes
example_quotes: You can't repeat the same song again. Please fix it, please.
Stuck on repeat with the same comfort songs. The app never gently nudges me to expand my rotation.
as a busy parent i have zero time to crate dig. i just want good new music to come to me with no effort

unmet_need: Personalized music curation that leads to long-term engagement
example_quotes: why do i save 10 songs off release radar and then never listen to them again. nothing ever sticks lol
New music never sticks for me. I play a recommended song once and forget it — it never makes it into my rotation.
As an aspirational explorer I save tons of new music and forget all of it. Retention and rotation are the real unmet need.

unmet_need: ability to filter out AI-generated music from recommendations
segment: music enthusiasts who value human-created content
example_quotes: Re: Mark / Disable AI Generated Songs. Ai music has ruined my Discover Weekly. Looked forward to it every week  😢
Re: Mark / Disable AI Generated Songs. Always create your own playlists, folks. Discover music through other sites instead

Re: Mark / Disable AI Generated Songs. I don’t post to stuff like this. Gang….if I can’t filter AI content soon, I’m out. Have loved the service for several years now, but I can’t even listen to my discover weekly anymore.

unmet_need: Users are seeking a more personalized and adventurous music discovery experience, with some feeling that the app's recommendations are too safe or limited, while others appreciate its functionality but have specific issues such as audio quality or intrusive features.
segment: Music enthusiasts, including both casual listeners and dedicated fans like K-pop enthusiasts, who value discovery and a seamless listening experience.
example_quotes: I really like this app. works well, good selection. Would recommend
my experience is so good with this app I love this app so much i recommend it to u guys
My experience listening to Spotify playlist been pretty good so far I give it five-star rating.

topic: No guided on-ramp into a new genre
unmet_need: Staged, goal-based exploration that coaches you into a genre
example_quotes: Re: No green checkmarks in user generated playlists. Hello, please don't remove this feature, I discover music mainly from user created playlists, and removing the green checkmark from appearing on these user made playlists makes it more difficult for me to track which songs are saved in my liked songs playlist.   Thanks!

Discovery only happens when you press play. How many new artists can you find to support?  Artists Wanted Edition 19 has over 60 artists waiting to be discovered. Every listener hears something different, and that's what makes music discovery so rewarding.    Which artists give you a reason to press play?   Let's go exploring. https://community.spotify.com/t5/Discovery-Promo/Artists-Wanted-Edition-19-Share-music-discover-music-like-music/td-p/7470135
